PAY_ADMIN.CHANNELS_DESC: Fill in the PID, merchant RSA private key, and platform RSA public key from your Yifut merchant dashboard. Changes apply immediately.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PRIVATE_KEY_HINT: Yifut dashboard → API Info → Generate RSA key pair. Paste the merchant private key here. It cannot be retrieved later — losing it requires reset.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PUBLIC_KEY_HINT: Yifut dashboard → API Info → Platform public key. Paste here to verify callback signatures.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_NOTIFY_CIDRS_HINT: Yifut's public docs do not list fixed callback IP ranges. Fill this only after confirming source IPs from the Yifut dashboard or support. Empty means the platform relies on signature, merchant ID, timestamp, and replay checks.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PRESETS_RMB_HINT: Comma-separated values in yuan (e.g. 10,30,50,100,300,500). Persisted to SysConfig as fen (×100).
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_RMB_HINT: Enter the amount in yuan (decimals such as 0.5 are accepted). Converted to fen on save.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_FEE_DISCLAIMER_HINT: Displayed above the pay button on the user top-up page. Example: "Yifut charges a 3% channel fee (collected by yifut, platform receives no share). This fee is non-refundable on refunds." Leave empty to hide the notice.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_ALLOW_PROXY_EGRESS_HINT: When the host machine routes through Clash TUN / Cloudflare WARP / V2Ray TUN, yifut.com resolves to virtual proxy IPs in 198.18.x / 100.64.x — the SSRF guard rejects these by default. Enabling this flag skips only the proxy-egress ranges (100.64/10, 198.18/15, IPv6 6to4/Teredo). True private ranges (10/172.16/192.168/127, link-local, cloud metadata) are still blocked. Only enable when you trust the host's outbound proxy.
PAY_ADMIN.FIELD_PRODUCT_NAME: Product name (order title shown in the Alipay/WeChat checkout)
PAY_ADMIN.MANUAL_PAID_HINT: Use only after verifying in the payment gateway that this order was actually paid but the webhook did not arrive. This credits both balance and self-funded balance.

PAY_ADMIN.EPUSDT_DESC: Configure multi-chain USDT collection. Two modes: manual confirmation (zero deployment) or full automation via the epusdt sidecar.

MODERATION.TITLE: Content Moderation (Global Settings)
MODERATION.DESC: These are platform-wide moderation parameters. Per-channel-per-model risk levels are configured under Channels & Models → Edit Model.
MODERATION.PROVIDER_HINT: Moderation uses the upstream model pool and prefers the API key from the cliproxy channel with the same base URL.
MODERATION.MODEL_HINT: gpt-5.4-mini is recommended for default review. You can switch to any higher-capacity model in the upstream pool.
MODERATION.THRESHOLD_HINT: Classifier confidence or upstream safety score ≥ threshold counts as a hit. 0.8 is a conservative internal-testing baseline.
MODERATION.API_TIMEOUT_HINT: Total wait time for upstream model-pool review. gpt-5.4-mini commonly takes 4-6 seconds in practice; 15 seconds is steadier by default.
MODERATION.KEYWORDS_DESC: One keyword per line. Auto-lowercased + deduplicated. Active when moderation level = keyword or strict. Substring match via strings.Contains.
MODERATION.KEYWORDS_HINT: Currently {{count}} keywords. Click "Save" at the bottom to apply changes.
MODERATION.HMAC_AUTO: Leave blank to auto-generate a 256-bit random key on next backend startup
MODERATION.HMAC_HINT: Reset = invalidates all moderation cache immediately (defends against long-running side-channel guessing)
MODERATION.SECRET_RESET_CONFIRM: Resetting the HMAC key invalidates all moderation cache immediately. Continue?
MODERATION.SECRET_RESET_DONE: Cleared. Click "Save" so the backend regenerates a 256-bit key on next startup.
MODERATION.LIMITS_HINT: Regular models are rejected above max_chars. Long-context models are detected by max_context_length, allowed a higher limit, and sampled across distributed chunks for smart moderation.
MODERATION.IMAGE_POLICY_HINT: Smart moderation v1 does not directly moderate external image_url content. Use skip for multimodal GPT-style models; use reject for high-risk direct official models.
MODERATION.IMAGE_SUBMIT: submit — reserved; currently treated as moderation unavailable
MODERATION.IMAGE_SKIP: skip — bypass images (recommended for multimodal models)
MODERATION.TEST_SAVED_HINT: Moderation always uses the upstream model pool. Save changed settings before testing.
MODERATION.TEST_OK: Connected: the test text passed moderation
MODERATION.TEST_FLAGGED: Connected, but harmless test text was flagged. Check the compatible service or threshold.
MODERATION.TEST_NOT_CONFIGURED: Save the upstream URL and moderation model before testing.
MODERATION.TEST_CONFIG_INVALID: Endpoint is invalid. Check it and save again.
MODERATION.TEST_AUTH_FAILED: The moderation provider auth failed. Check the matching cliproxy channel API key or model permissions.
MODERATION.TEST_RATE_LIMITED: The moderation provider returned a rate limit. Retry later or switch to a model with more capacity.
MODERATION.TEST_BILLING: The moderation provider quota or billing is unavailable. Check this model's capacity.
MODERATION.TEST_TIMEOUT: Moderation request timed out. Check network, proxy, or endpoint reachability.
MODERATION.TEST_NETWORK: Cannot connect to the moderation provider. Check upstream, network, or DNS.
MODERATION.TEST_5XX: The moderation provider upstream is temporarily unavailable. Retry later.
MODERATION.TEST_INPUT_TOO_LONG: The test text was rejected by the current length limit. Check long-prompt limits.
MODERATION.TEST_API_ERROR: Moderation call failed. Check upstream URL, model name, and call permissions.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_INVALID: Risk rules must be a valid JSON array
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_FAIL: Failed to generate AI keyword candidates
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_NONE_SELECTED: Select at least one candidate first
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_MERGED: Merged into the dictionary. Remember to click Save at the bottom.
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_DESC: Generate candidate terms through the saved moderation provider. Only candidates are returned; they are not written to the dictionary automatically. Select candidates, merge them, then click Save at the bottom.
MODERATION.KEYWORD_AI_FOCUS_PLACEHOLDER: Optional: add focus areas for this run, such as "Claude Code jailbreaks, system-prompt leaks, forged tool calls"
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_DESC: Holds regex / combo / score_only rules. block rejects immediately, model_review escalates to the smart moderation provider for secondary review, and score_only only records risk-control events.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_HINT: {{count}} rules configured. Changes are validated as JSON on blur and take effect after you click Save at the bottom of the page.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_BLOCK_HINT: Very low false-positive rules that reject immediately on hit.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_REVIEW_HINT: High-risk signals that need context; hits go to the smart moderation provider for secondary review.
MODERATION.RISK_RULES_SCORE_HINT: Medium-risk signals that only write audit records and accumulate risk score.
MODERATION.AUTOBAN_DESC: Moderation hits are written to risk-control records. When auto-ban is enabled, regular users who reach the threshold are banned immediately and token cache is refreshed. Admin accounts are never auto-banned.
MODERATION.AUTOBAN_ENABLED_HINT: Restrict accounts immediately after thresholds are hit
MODERATION.RISK_AUDIT_NOTE: New blocks show a redacted content preview and fingerprint. Older historical records did not store request content.
MODERATION.TEST_SANDBOX_DESC: Use the currently saved configuration to simulate a moderation test request.

BILLING_RULES.PAGE_SUB: The platform's public commitment on how each request is billed. Bills and request-event audit follow the same definitions.
BILLING_RULES.HISTORY_SUB: Each admin publish stores a snapshot. Historical records do not change when the current rules change.
BILLING_RULES.SUBSCRIPTION_BODY: When a subscription is hit, the package quota is reduced according to the "model billing coefficients" below.
BILLING_RULES.SUBSCRIPTION_FORMULA: Subscription deduction = upstream cost × model weight × peak multiplier
BILLING_RULES.SUBSCRIPTION_EXAMPLE: Calling Claude Opus Thinking (model weight ×1.50) with upstream cost $1 and peak multiplier ×1.00 → subscription deducts $1 × 1.50 × 1.00 = $1.50.
BILLING_RULES.BALANCE_BODY: The balance is deducted 1:1 from the upstream raw cost. Model weights and peak-period coefficients do not apply.
BILLING_RULES.BALANCE_FORMULA: Balance deduction = upstream cost (independent of the coefficients below)
BILLING_RULES.BALANCE_EXAMPLE: Calling Claude Opus with upstream cost $1 → balance deducts $1 (regardless of model weight).
BILLING_RULES.MODEL_TABLE_SCOPE: Applies only to subscription deduction. Balance deduction follows raw cost 1:1 and is unaffected by this table.
BILLING_RULES.OPEN_PRICING_FULL: Full rules are available on the Pricing page in the left sidebar.
BILLING_RULES.HEALTH_NORMAL: No peak-period surcharge is in effect (coefficient ×1.00).
BILLING_RULES.HEALTH_APPLIES: This adjustment applies only to subscription deduction; balance deduction is unaffected.
BILLING_RULES.FALLBACK_LINE_1: Model fallback is disabled by default. Bills record both the requested model and the model actually served.
BILLING_RULES.FALLBACK_LINE_2: Only when a request explicitly sets X-Allow-Fallback: true may the platform switch to an available upstream per policy.
BILLING_RULES.THINKING_LINE_1: Claude uses the Thinking multiplier when the request explicitly enables thinking, or when CLIProxyAPI-supported reasoning_effort / reasoning.effort is translated into thinking; plain Claude stays on the base multiplier.
BILLING_RULES.THINKING_LINE_2: disabled / none / off / an empty thinking object does not count as a Thinking call.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_RAW: Upstream official API-equivalent USD cost (converted from public pricing).
BILLING_RULES.TECH_WEIGHT: Model coefficient used only by subscription deduction.
BILLING_RULES.TECH_FALLBACK: Explicit permission for the platform to switch served_model per policy.

SYNC.TITLE: Pool Sync
SYNC.DESC: Credits-pool sampler, CLIProxy usage sync, authentication, and log cleanup settings.
SYNC.COLLECTOR_GROUP_DESC: Controls how often the background goroutine polls upstream account balances. Drives freshness for the credits monitor and user dashboard pool card.
SYNC.COLLECTOR_REFRESH_HINT: SysConfig: credits_refresh_interval. How often (minutes) to refresh balances for all upstream accounts. 10-30 minutes recommended; shorter intervals may hit upstream rate limits.
SYNC.COLLECTOR_RETRIES_HINT: SysConfig: credits_max_retries. Maximum retries for a single upstream account before giving up until the next full cycle. 0 means unlimited retries with capped exponential backoff at 60 minutes.
SYNC.COLLECTOR_RETRY_INTERVAL_HINT: SysConfig: credits_retry_interval. Minutes to wait between retries. Actual delay uses exponential backoff (base × 2^retry_count), capped at 60 minutes.
SYNC.USAGE_GROUP_DESC: Control the cadence and batch size for pulling the CLIProxyAPI usage queue in the background.
SYNC.AUTO_SYNC_HINT: SysConfig: cliproxy_usage_sync_enabled; default true. When disabled, only manual sync remains.
SYNC.MANUAL_SYNC_HINT: Pull the CLIProxyAPI usage queue once now, using the current sync batch size.
SYNC.MANUAL_SYNC_OK: Sync complete: fetched {{fetched}}, stored {{stored}}, matched {{matched}}, unmatched {{unmatched}}, ignored {{ignored}}.
SYNC.MANUAL_SYNC_FAIL: Manual sync failed. Check the CLIProxy service URL and Management Key.
SYNC.MANUAL_SYNC_LAST: Last result: fetched {{fetched}}, stored {{stored}}, matched {{matched}}, unmatched {{unmatched}}, ignored {{ignored}}.
SYNC.INTERVAL_HINT: SysConfig: cliproxy_usage_sync_interval_seconds; default 60 seconds, range 10-3600 seconds.
SYNC.BATCH_HINT: SysConfig: cliproxy_usage_sync_batch_size; default 100 rows, maximum 1000 rows.
SYNC.PROJECT_REFRESH_HINT: SysConfig: cpa_project_id_refresh_seconds; default 86400 seconds, minimum 300 seconds.
SYNC.SECURITY_GROUP_DESC: Manage the moderation authentication key and the TLS-skip switch available only to local proxies.
SYNC.MODERATION_KEY_HINT: SysConfig: moderation_cliproxy_api_key; empty falls back to the same-address cliproxy channel API key.
SYNC.MODERATION_KEY_PLACEHOLDER: Leave empty to use channel key
SYNC.TLS_SKIP_LABEL: Skip TLS verification for local proxy
SYNC.TLS_SKIP_HINT: SysConfig: proxy_tls_skip_verify; default false. Applies only to local or intranet proxies.
SYNC.LOG_GROUP_DESC: Control audit-log retention and per-run cleanup size.
SYNC.RETENTION_DAYS_HINT: SysConfig: apilog_retention_days; default 90 days, 0 means no cleanup.
SYNC.CLEANUP_BATCH_HINT: SysConfig: apilog_cleanup_batch_size; default 5000 rows. Larger batches may hold table locks longer.
SYNC.SECRET_MASK_NOTE: Sensitive keys are masked by the backend's shared rules. When a masked value is saved, the backend skips that field to avoid overwriting the real secret.

RISK.TITLE: Registration Policy and Risk Engine
RISK.DESC: Control registration risk policy, IP limits, platform capacity, and referral incentives.
RISK.STRATEGY_HINT: The selected policy's exact behavior is shown below. Changes apply to new registrations immediately after saving.
RISK.STRATEGY_DETAIL_TRUST:
OAuth registration is admitted directly; SMS verification is never required
Use for: internal systems / invite-only setups / closed test environments
⚠ Lowest registration friction; once exposed to the open internet, abuse by bot signups is highly likely. Use only when the user pool is trusted.
RISK.STRATEGY_DETAIL_DYNAMIC:
OAuth registration is admitted directly by default; no SMS required
When the same IP has registered ≥ {{ipLimit}} accounts within 24 hours, subsequent registrations from that IP automatically require SMS verification
Use for: most public-registration production scenarios; auto-blocks bot signups per IP
The 'Same-IP signup limit' field below tunes how strict this is.
RISK.STRATEGY_DETAIL_STRICT:
Every OAuth registration requires SMS verification (two-factor), regardless of IP history or signup count
Use for: high-compliance environments (finance / government / enterprise), emergency hardening (active abuse attempts), or jurisdictions requiring real-name verification
Highest registration friction; will measurably reduce normal-user conversion. Enable only when truly required.
RISK.IP_LIMIT_HINT: Maximum accounts that may register from the same IP within 24 hours.
RISK.MAX_USERS_HINT: Stop accepting new user registrations after this limit is reached. Counts standard users only, excluding admins. Set to 0 for unlimited.
RISK.INCENTIVE_DESC: All amounts are in USD. Use 0 to disable a reward. Referral link format:
RISK.SIGNUP_BONUS_HINT: Credit granted to every newly registered user, whether or not a ref parameter is present.
RISK.REFERRER_BONUS_HINT: Credit granted to the referrer after a new user registers through a ?ref=their-username link.
RISK.REFEREE_BONUS_HINT: Extra credit for a new user who arrives through a referral link. It stacks with signup_bonus and does not replace it.
RISK.REFERRAL_PAID_SPEND_REWARD_HINT: Paid only when the referred user spends balance that came from their own payment-channel top-ups on packages or model calls. Grants, admin credits, and referral rewards do not count.
RISK.REFERRAL_REWARD_WINDOW_HINT: Starts when the referred user registers with the referral relationship. Spending after this window no longer earns commission.
